data.name: OWASP API Security Top 10
data.description: Broad coverage mapped across the OWASP API Security Top 10 risk categories.

data.name: Broken Access Control
data.description: Object- and function-level authorization checks (OWASP API1/API3/API5).

data.name: Broken Authentication
data.description: Anonymous access, JWT flaws and default credentials (OWASP API2).

data.name: Injection
data.description: Reflected XSS, SQL injection, command injection and open redirect.

data.name: Server-Side Request Forgery
data.description: In-band and blind out-of-band SSRF (OWASP API7).

data.name: Security Misconfiguration
data.description: CORS, exposed metrics/documentation and inventory exposure (OWASP API8/API9).

data.name: Full Scan
data.description: Every registered test type applicable to the endpoint, including community templates.
